metadata.description: Multi-language Claude Code agents and skills for production-grade development

plugins.name: core-skills
plugins.description: Language-agnostic process skills covering error handling, testing strategy, code review, API design, concurrency, observability, Docker, project structure, and code style

plugins.name: go-skills
plugins.description: Go-specific implementation patterns for error handling, testing, concurrency, context, database, interfaces, modules, CLI, API design, observability, Docker, and project scaffolding

plugins.name: ops-skills
plugins.description: Opt-in external-write skills: git push, PR creation, release publishing, container registry push. NOT enabled by default — install only when the project authorizes Claude to write to external services.
